title: Easier Netherite
description: Make gathering Netherite a bit easier for yourself!
body:
# Easier Netherite
Easier Netherite reworks Netherite progression a bit to make obtaining Netherite less tedious while keeping it balanced and rewarding.

### Ancient Debris drops Raw Netherite
Ancient Debris no longer drops itself when mined normally. Instead, it drops Raw Netherite - unless a Silk Touch pickaxe is used.

### Fortune works on Ancient Debris
Fortune can also increase the amount of Raw Netherite dropped from Ancient Debris, giving you a reason to enchant your pickaxe before mining it.

![fortune on ancient debris](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f92bcdb1e4dd73e10886e0f1991b781826aaad63.png)

### New Netherite progression
Netherite Ingots can no longer be crafted using the vanilla recipe. Instead, you'll need to:
1. Mine Ancient Debris to obtain Raw Netherite
2. Craft 4 Raw Netherite into Netherite Scrap
3. Smelt Netherite Scrap into a Netherite Ingot

You can also obtain Netherite Nuggets from piglin bartering and craft Raw Netherite from them!

![raw netherite can be also crafted from 9 netherite nuggets](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ffb65eada0e3cae39e3bcff06bad8c26e8b9af39.png)
![netherite scraps are crafted from raw netherite](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e7daef3b7109cae6bbfbad9062cc92c7bd175125.png)

### Supported versions
This mod is available for **Fabric, Forge and Neoforge - 1.20.1, 1.21.1 and 26.1.2**

Will be updated to new stable releases of course!

#

If you find any issues, report them on our [Github issues page](https://github.com/JustErikSK/EasierNetherite-Mod/issues) for this mod.
